epigraph.quote: The icecreams were delicious. Simon had coffee. I had toffee.

per_stop.quote: We had a pretty drive west through showers & sunshine.
The most amazing part of it is Wogan's Cavern, where supplies from boats were unloaded + carried up a spiral staircase into the castle.
rainsqualls were so heavy that we didn't get out of the van.
After church the sun shone + we have had continuous hot sunshine all afternoon.
